task_objective: Professional Fashion Inspiration Transfer & High-Precision Image Editing

structural_reference.description: High-precision preservation of garment structural framework, including exact proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length

aesthetic_reference.description: Extract high-end aesthetic elements, including color system, pattern texture, and overall style tone

mode_set.description: Maintain model consistency from Figure 2 (if present), full-body presentation, precise preservation of identity features and facial details

workflow.step_1_structural_analysis: Perform high-precision structural analysis of Figure 1 line art, identify and extract garment silhouette lines, cutting structure, proportional relationships, seam positions, and detail features, establish precise structural blueprint
workflow.step_2_aesthetic_extraction: Conduct in-depth aesthetic analysis of Figure 2, extract color palette, pattern texture, and overall style elements, create transferable aesthetic component library
workflow.step_3_prompt_generation: Based on structural blueprint and aesthetic component library, generate 4 unique fashion design prompts, each targeting different aesthetic interpretations, maintaining structural integrity while showcasing diverse design possibilities, each prompt within 100 words, accurate professional terminology, specific aesthetic descriptions, clear structural constraints
workflow.step_4_image_generation: Generate high-quality fashion design images based on 4 professional prompts in 2x2 grid layout, ensure perfect balance between structural accuracy and aesthetic expression
workflow.prefix: Professional fashion photography, no text, front standard view, high-definition details. Figure 1 line art is absolute structural blueprint, strictly replicate its exact proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length with zero deviation. Only surface aesthetic elements (color, pattern, texture, fabric texture) may change. Ensure no layout shift, no perspective distortion, completely consistent proportions. Consistent with specified model style.
